  *     * ### Constructor Detail

      * #### RecordReader

            public RecordReader([InputGate](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/partition/consumer/InputGate.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.runtime.io.network.partition.consumer") inputGate,
                                [Class](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/lang/Class.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang")<[T](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/reader/RecordReader.html> "type parameter in RecordReader")> recordType,
                                [String](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/lang/String.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang")[] tmpDirectories)

Creates a new RecordReader that de-serializes records from the given input gate and can spill partial records to disk, if they grow large.

Parameters:
    `inputGate` \- The input gate to read from.
    `tmpDirectories` \- The temp directories. USed for spilling if the reader concurrently reconstructs multiple large records.
